auditor: Claude Opus 4.6 — God Mode CTO Audit

projects.name: ios-agent-runner
projects.architect_recommendation: Highest-value demo project. Add pytest integration tests, wire up GitHub Actions, add CLAUDE.md. This is the showpiece for Godman Automations.

projects.name: ralph-claude-code
projects.architect_recommendation: Most mature project in the portfolio. 465 tests, CI/CD, modular libs. Package for distribution or open-source release.

projects.name: plaid-control-center
missing_for_god_mode: Needs Plaid production credentials for real use
projects.architect_recommendation: Financial dashboard with real bank integration. Add integration tests and a demo mode for showcasing without live credentials.

projects.name: kroger-playground
projects.architect_recommendation: Price hunting CLI + Streamlit UI. Solid for personal use. To productize: add price alert scheduling, historical tracking, and a notification system.

projects.name: yr01-gateway
missing_for_god_mode: No CI/CD pipeline (has test runner but no automation)
Deployed via systemd on Pi but no container
projects.architect_recommendation: BLE smart lock gateway running on Pi5. Has tests and systemd service. Add Dockerfile and CI/CD for reproducible deploys.

projects.name: yr01-console
projects.architect_recommendation: Companion web UI for the lock gateway. Needs documentation and test coverage. Consider merging into a monorepo with yr01-gateway.

projects.name: ulan-agent
missing_for_god_mode: Needs device control layer on top of discovery
projects.architect_recommendation: Network device discovery agent — this is NotebookLM Category 3. Add actual device control (Yamaha YNCA, LG WebOS) on top of the scanner to complete the Universal Scanner vision.

projects.name: clipboard-intelligence-mcp
projects.architect_recommendation: MCP server for clipboard history/intelligence. Well-structured with tests. Add README and publish to npm as a reusable MCP tool.

projects.name: godmanautomations-website
missing_for_god_mode: No actual product or services content
projects.architect_recommendation: This should be the public face of the entire operation. Rebuild with a real framework (Next.js or Astro), add capability pages for each project, case studies, and a contact form.

projects.name: godman-lab
missing_for_god_mode: Trapped in an iPhone backup — needs to be pulled into a proper git repo
15+ test files but no automation running them
projects.architect_recommendation: This is a MONSTER. AI OS with plugin architecture, 25+ tools (email, OCR, tax, sheets, drive, vision), receipt processing, F250 diagnostics. Extract from backup, get it into GitHub, wire up CI. This could be the core of Godman Automations' backend platform.

projects.name: nova-ai-studio
missing_for_god_mode: Living in Google Drive, not version controlled
projects.architect_recommendation: AI assistant with memory, personas, and web browsing. Predecessor to the current Claude-based agent work. Evaluate what's worth salvaging vs. rebuilding on the Claude/Anthropic stack.

projects.name: MAX AI (Pi5)
missing_for_god_mode: No container (runs in venv with systemd)
Anti-hallucination guide exists but no automated testing
projects.architect_recommendation: Running AI API server on Pi5 with 5 Ollama models, brain/personality/memory/tools architecture, nginx proxy, OliveTin admin panel. Dockerize it for reproducible deploys and add health check monitoring.

projects.name: PriceBot Suite (Pi5)
projects.architect_recommendation: Salon product price discovery for 5 brands (Color Wow, Davines, KM, Moroccanoil, Olaplex) with Square POS integration. This is a real business tool for your wife's salon. Activate from DRY_RUN, consolidate into one configurable service, add price change alerts.

projects.name: open-webui-stack
projects.stack: Docker Compose (Open WebUI, Ollama, MCP bridge)
projects.architect_recommendation: Local LLM interface stack. Merge the two copies, document the setup, and consider connecting it to the Pi5 Ollama instance.

projects.name: mcp (apify-mcp-server)
projects.architect_recommendation: Experimental MCP server. Either develop fully or archive — don't leave skeletons around.

projects.name: stephen-call-pack
projects.architect_recommendation: Archive or delete. No code exists.

projects.name: briefing-binder
projects.architect_recommendation: Documentation/notes project. Keep as reference but don't count as a software project.

summary.biggest_gap: CI/CD — only ralph-claude-code has it. Every other project ships manually.
summary.biggest_opportunity: godman-lab is trapped in an iPhone backup with 25+ tools, 15 tests, Docker support. Extract it to GitHub and it instantly becomes the most capable project in the portfolio.
immediate_actions: Extract godman-lab from iPhone backup to GitHub
Add pytest + GitHub Actions to ios-agent-runner
Activate PriceBot from DRY_RUN for the salon
Rebuild godmanautomations.ai as a real capabilities showcase
